query:single.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object with keys "input_waveform" and "selected_spectrum"; each value is a pixel bounding box [x0,y0,x1,y1] around the input waveform panel or the matching spectrum option panel
query:single.answer_hint: set "answer" to the matching spectrum option letter as a string
